title: centaurea micracantha
intro: Centaurea micracantha, also known as the lesser knapweed, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been reported to aid in the treatment of wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The plant's leaves and roots have been used in herbal preparations to provide relief from various health conditions, such as skin irritations, respiratory issues, and menstrual cramps. In addition to its medicinal uses, Centaurea micracantha has been used in traditional herbal medicine to promote digestive health, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system.
